name: sbox-claude
description: Build s&box games by talking to Claude — or any AI. The Claude Bridge: an MCP server (170+ tools / 166 handlers) that drives the s&box editor, plus sbox-cookbook — a code-grounded recipe brain mined from real, shipped open-source s&box games.

plugins.name: sbox-claude
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to the s&box game engine and build games by describing them. The Claude Bridge MCP server (170+ tools / 166 handlers) drives GameObjects, scripts, scenes, components, physics, networking, UI, world-gen, lighting & atmosphere, characters, navmesh & spatial queries, particles, scatter, console/C# execution, live docs + type reflection — and now networking/scene/save inspection & lint. Bundles five skills: sbox-cookbook (a code-grounded recipe brain — inventories, economies, save systems, shops, gacha, progression, multiplayer netcode, level design, and full genre playbooks, all mined from real shipped s&box games), sbox-api (Unity→s&box translation + API references), sbox-build-feature (the screenshot-driven build/verify workflow), sbox-scaffold-game, and sbox-setup onboarding — plus an optional sbox-game-dev specialist agent. The s&box-side bridge addon installs separately into your project's Libraries folder (see plugin README). AGPL-3.0-or-later.
